title: Senior Financial Analyst - Sharekhan - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Sharekhan - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
